title: United Kingdom Register to Vote
description: Register an individual on the electoral register in Great Britain using the official nationwide 'Register to vote' service. This document describes the applicant's identity, nationality, current and recent addresses, National Insurance number, and open-register preference that the service collects. It does not submit the registration; the live register-to-vote.service.gov.uk source is always authoritative (see VERIFICATION.md).

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema authored from the official GOV.UK 'Register to vote' guidance page and the well-established field set of the register-to-vote.service.gov.uk flow. The service confirmation, the National Insurance number requirement (with a documented no-NINo fallback), nationality, name, date of birth, current/previous address, and open-register opt-out were confirmed against the source; individual input fields reflect the known online flow but the screen-by-screen field order and labels have not yet been independently captured. Eligibility (age, nationality, residence) and any nation-specific differences (England/Scotland/Wales) are described, not encoded. Status remains 'draft'. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: nationality
fields.label: What is your nationality?
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Eligibility to register depends on nationality (British, Irish, qualifying Commonwealth, or EU citizens may register, with the elections they can vote in varying by status). Enter the nationality as given on the service; multiple nationalities may be recorded.

fields.name: lastName
fields.label: Last name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: firstName
fields.label: First name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: middleNames
fields.label: Middle names
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: hasPreviousName
fields.label: Have you changed your name in the last 12 months?
fields.description: If yes, the service collects your previous name.

fields.name: previousName
fields.label: Previous name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required only when hasPreviousName is true: the full name you used before the change.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. YYYY-MM-DD. You can register at 16 (or 14 in Scotland and Wales) but cannot vote until you are old enough for the election concerned.
fields.sourceRef: Register to vote — Date of birth

fields.name: nationalInsuranceNumber
fields.label: National Insurance number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Two letters, six digits, and a final letter (A-D), without spaces, e.g. QQ123456C. Normally required to confirm identity, but you can still register without one — declared via hasNationalInsuranceNumber, in which case the local Electoral Registration Officer may ask for other evidence.
fields.sourceRef: Register to vote — National Insurance number

fields.name: hasNationalInsuranceNumber
fields.label: Do you have a National Insurance number?
fields.description: If false, the service lets you register without one and explain why; the Electoral Registration Officer may request alternative identity evidence.
fields.sourceRef: Register to vote — National Insurance number

fields.name: addressLine1
fields.label: Address — building and street
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The address where you live and want to be registered to vote.

fields.name: addressLine2
fields.label: Address — second line (optional)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: addressTown
fields.label: Town or city
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: addressPostcode
fields.label: Postcode
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. A UK postcode in uppercase, e.g. SW1A 1AA.

fields.name: movedInLast12Months
fields.label: Have you moved in the last 12 months?
fields.description: If yes, the service collects your previous address so your old registration can be updated.

fields.name: previousAddressLine1
fields.label: Previous address — building and street
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required only when movedInLast12Months is true: the address you last lived at.

fields.name: previousAddressTown
fields.label: Previous address — town or city
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required only when movedInLast12Months is true.

fields.name: previousAddressPostcode
fields.label: Previous address — postcode
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required only when movedInLast12Months is true. A UK postcode in uppercase.

fields.name: email
fields.label: Email address
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Used to send confirmation that the registration was received.

fields.name: phone
fields.label: Phone number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Optional contact number, in international E.164 format, e.g. +447700900000.

fields.name: openRegisterOptOut
fields.label: Remove me from the open register
fields.description: The open (edited) register can be bought by any person or organisation. Set true to opt out of the open register; opting out does not affect your right to vote or your inclusion on the full electoral register.
